name: ctfd-mariokart-theme
description: A Mario Kart themed CTFd theme

scripts.package-theme: rm -rf mariokart-theme && mkdir -p mariokart-theme && cp theme.json mariokart-theme/theme.json && cp -R assets mariokart-theme/assets && cp -R static mariokart-theme/static && cp -R templates mariokart-theme/templates && rm -f mariokart-theme.zip && zip -qr mariokart-theme.zip mariokart-theme
